sections.paragraph:
- Original: Κρήσκης

- Transliteration: Kreskes

- Phonetic: krace'-kace

- Definition: Crescens = "growing"

1. an assistant of Paul, said to be one of the seventy disciples

- Origin: of Latin origin

- TDNT entry: None

- Part(s) of speech: Noun Masculine

- Strong's: Of Latin origin; growing; Cresces (that is Crescens) a Christian: - Crescens.
